compactions_owner.name: compactions_owner
compactions_owner.using:
chat_id IN (
        SELECT id FROM chats
        WHERE owner_user_id = current_setting('app.current_user_id', true)
      )

messages_owner.name: messages_owner
messages_owner.using:
chat_id IN (
        SELECT id FROM chats
        WHERE owner_user_id = current_setting('app.current_user_id', true)
      )

messages_public_read.name: messages_public_read
messages_public_read.using: current_setting('app.current_user_id', true) = '' AND chat_id IN (SELECT id FROM chats WHERE visibility = 'public')

run_events_owner.name: run_events_owner
run_events_owner.using:
run_id IN (
        SELECT id FROM runs
        WHERE user_id = current_setting('app.current_user_id', true)
      )

configs_select.name: configs_select
configs_select.using:
(
        (scope_type = 'user' AND scope_id = current_setting('app.current_user_id', true))
        OR (scope_type = 'chat' AND EXISTS (
          SELECT 1 FROM chats c
          WHERE c.id::text = configs.scope_id
            AND c.owner_user_id = current_setting('app.current_user_id', true)
        ))
        OR (scope_type = 'org_unit' AND (
          EXISTS (
            SELECT 1 FROM memberships m
            JOIN org_units mu ON mu.id = m.org_unit_id
            WHERE m.user_id = current_setting('app.current_user_id', true)
              AND configs.scope_id = ANY(string_to_array(mu.path, '/'))
          )
          OR EXISTS (
            SELECT 1 FROM org_units u
            WHERE u.id::text = configs.scope_id
              AND EXISTS (
                SELECT 1 FROM memberships m2
                WHERE m2.user_id = current_setting('app.current_user_id', true)
                  AND m2.org_unit_id::text = ANY(string_to_array(u.path, '/'))
              )
          )
        ))
      )

configs_write.name: configs_write
configs_write.using:
(
    (scope_type = 'user' AND scope_id = current_setting('app.current_user_id', true))
    OR (scope_type = 'chat' AND EXISTS (
      SELECT 1 FROM chats c
      WHERE c.id::text = configs.scope_id
        AND c.owner_user_id = current_setting('app.current_user_id', true)
    ))
    OR (scope_type = 'org_unit' AND EXISTS (
      SELECT 1 FROM org_units u
      WHERE u.id::text = configs.scope_id
        AND EXISTS (
          SELECT 1 FROM memberships m
          WHERE m.user_id = current_setting('app.current_user_id', true)
            AND m.role IN ('owner','admin')
            AND m.org_unit_id::text = ANY(string_to_array(u.path, '/'))
        )
    ))
  )
configs_write.withCheck:
(
    (scope_type = 'user' AND scope_id = current_setting('app.current_user_id', true))
    OR (scope_type = 'chat' AND EXISTS (
      SELECT 1 FROM chats c
      WHERE c.id::text = configs.scope_id
        AND c.owner_user_id = current_setting('app.current_user_id', true)
    ))
    OR (scope_type = 'org_unit' AND EXISTS (
      SELECT 1 FROM org_units u
      WHERE u.id::text = configs.scope_id
        AND EXISTS (
          SELECT 1 FROM memberships m
          WHERE m.user_id = current_setting('app.current_user_id', true)
            AND m.role IN ('owner','admin')
            AND m.org_unit_id::text = ANY(string_to_array(u.path, '/'))
        )
    ))
  )

memberships_insert.name: memberships_insert
memberships_insert.withCheck:
(
        user_id = current_setting('app.current_user_id', true)
        AND role = 'owner'
        AND EXISTS (
          SELECT 1 FROM org_units u
          WHERE u.id = memberships.org_unit_id
            AND u.parent_id IS NULL
            AND u.created_by = current_setting('app.current_user_id', true)
        )
      ) OR EXISTS (
        SELECT 1 FROM org_units u
        WHERE u.id = memberships.org_unit_id
          AND EXISTS (
            SELECT 1 FROM memberships granter
            WHERE granter.user_id = current_setting('app.current_user_id', true)
              AND granter.role IN ('owner','admin')
              AND granter.org_unit_id::text = ANY(string_to_array(u.path, '/'))
          )
      )

memberships_update.name: memberships_update
memberships_update.using:
EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM org_units u
    WHERE u.id = memberships.org_unit_id
      AND EXISTS (
        SELECT 1 FROM memberships granter
        WHERE granter.user_id = current_setting('app.current_user_id', true)
          AND granter.role IN ('owner','admin')
          AND granter.org_unit_id::text = ANY(string_to_array(u.path, '/'))
      )
  )
memberships_update.withCheck:
EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM org_units u
    WHERE u.id = memberships.org_unit_id
      AND EXISTS (
        SELECT 1 FROM memberships granter
        WHERE granter.user_id = current_setting('app.current_user_id', true)
          AND granter.role IN ('owner','admin')
          AND granter.org_unit_id::text = ANY(string_to_array(u.path, '/'))
      )
  )

memberships_delete.name: memberships_delete
memberships_delete.using:
user_id = current_setting('app.current_user_id', true) OR EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM org_units u
    WHERE u.id = memberships.org_unit_id
      AND EXISTS (
        SELECT 1 FROM memberships granter
        WHERE granter.user_id = current_setting('app.current_user_id', true)
          AND granter.role IN ('owner','admin')
          AND granter.org_unit_id::text = ANY(string_to_array(u.path, '/'))
      )
  )

org_units_select.name: org_units_select
org_units_select.using:
EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM memberships m
    WHERE m.user_id = current_setting('app.current_user_id', true)
      AND m.role IN ('owner','admin','maintainer','member','viewer','guest','service_account')
      AND m.org_unit_id::text = ANY(string_to_array(org_units.path, '/'))
  ) OR created_by = current_setting('app.current_user_id', true)

org_units_insert.name: org_units_insert
org_units_insert.withCheck:
created_by = current_setting('app.current_user_id', true) AND (parent_id IS NULL OR EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM memberships m
    WHERE m.user_id = current_setting('app.current_user_id', true)
      AND m.role IN ('owner','admin')
      AND m.org_unit_id::text = ANY(string_to_array(org_units.path, '/'))
  ))

org_units_update.name: org_units_update
org_units_update.using:
EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM memberships m
    WHERE m.user_id = current_setting('app.current_user_id', true)
      AND m.role IN ('owner','admin')
      AND m.org_unit_id::text = ANY(string_to_array(org_units.path, '/'))
  )
org_units_update.withCheck:
EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM memberships m
    WHERE m.user_id = current_setting('app.current_user_id', true)
      AND m.role IN ('owner','admin')
      AND m.org_unit_id::text = ANY(string_to_array(org_units.path, '/'))
  )

org_units_delete.name: org_units_delete
org_units_delete.using:
EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM memberships m
    WHERE m.user_id = current_setting('app.current_user_id', true)
      AND m.role IN ('owner')
      AND m.org_unit_id::text = ANY(string_to_array(org_units.path, '/'))
  )

todos_owner.name: todos_owner
todos_owner.using:
EXISTS (
        SELECT 1 FROM chats c
        WHERE c.id = "todos"."chat_id"
          AND c.owner_user_id = current_setting('app.current_user_id', true)
      )

credentials_select.name: credentials_select
credentials_select.using:
EXISTS (
        SELECT 1 FROM provider_accounts pa
        WHERE pa.id = credentials.provider_account_id
      )

credentials_write.name: credentials_write
credentials_write.using:
EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM provider_accounts pa
    WHERE pa.id = credentials.provider_account_id
      AND (
        (pa.owner_scope_type = 'user' AND pa.owner_scope_id = current_setting('app.current_user_id', true))
        OR (pa.owner_scope_type = 'org_unit' AND EXISTS (
          SELECT 1 FROM org_units u
          WHERE u.id::text = pa.owner_scope_id
            AND EXISTS (
              SELECT 1 FROM memberships m
              WHERE m.user_id = current_setting('app.current_user_id', true)
                AND m.role IN ('owner','admin')
                AND m.org_unit_id::text = ANY(string_to_array(u.path, '/'))
            )
        ))
      )
  )
credentials_write.withCheck:
EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM provider_accounts pa
    WHERE pa.id = credentials.provider_account_id
      AND (
        (pa.owner_scope_type = 'user' AND pa.owner_scope_id = current_setting('app.current_user_id', true))
        OR (pa.owner_scope_type = 'org_unit' AND EXISTS (
          SELECT 1 FROM org_units u
          WHERE u.id::text = pa.owner_scope_id
            AND EXISTS (
              SELECT 1 FROM memberships m
              WHERE m.user_id = current_setting('app.current_user_id', true)
                AND m.role IN ('owner','admin')
                AND m.org_unit_id::text = ANY(string_to_array(u.path, '/'))
            )
        ))
      )
  )
